name: PYAS Scanner
description: Classifies PE files with the bundled ONNX model and emits JSON Lines when launched by KSword.

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan one or more PE files or directories.
commands.syntax: --target-kind file --path PATH | --target-kind process --pid PID --path IMAGE_PATH [--process-name NAME]

commands.name: info
commands.description: Print the plugin's protocol capabilities as JSON Lines.
